# CMake-only content.                                                          #
#                                                                              #
# To disable autogeneration for this file entirely, delete this header.        #
################################################################################

iree_add_all_subdirs()

loom_cc_binary(
  NAME
    loom-compile
  SRCS
    "loom-compile.c"
  COPTS

  DEPS
    iree::base
    iree::base::tooling::flags
    iree::io::file_handle
    loom::src::loom::error::diagnostic
    loom::src::loom::ops::op_registry
    loom::src::loom::tooling::compile::pipeline
    loom::src::loom::tooling::execution::compile_options
    loom::src::loom::tooling::execution::compile_report_capture
    loom::src::loom::tooling::execution::execution_provider
    loom::src::loom::tooling::execution::hal_backend
    loom::src::loom::tooling::execution::hal_candidate
    loom::src::loom::tooling::execution::hal_runtime
    loom::src::loom::tooling::execution::session
    loom::src::loom::tooling::io::file
)

iree_lit_test_suite(
  NAME
    lit_test
  SRCS
    "loom-compile_test.txt"
  TOOLS
    ::loom-compile
    FileCheck
    iree-run-module
  LABELS
    "hostonly"
)

### BAZEL_TO_CMAKE_PRESERVES_ALL_CONTENT_BELOW_THIS_LINE ###

set(_LOOM_COMPILE_ALL_PROVIDERS amdgpu ireevm)
set(LOOM_COMPILE_PROVIDERS "${_LOOM_COMPILE_ALL_PROVIDERS}" CACHE STRING
  "Semicolon-separated list of providers linked into loom-compile."
)
foreach(_LOOM_COMPILE_PROVIDER ${LOOM_COMPILE_PROVIDERS})
  if(NOT _LOOM_COMPILE_PROVIDER IN_LIST _LOOM_COMPILE_ALL_PROVIDERS)
    message(FATAL_ERROR
      "Unknown loom-compile provider '${_LOOM_COMPILE_PROVIDER}'. "
      "Expected one of: ${_LOOM_COMPILE_ALL_PROVIDERS}"
    )
  endif()
endforeach()

iree_package_name(_LOOM_COMPILE_PACKAGE_NAME)
set(_LOOM_COMPILE_TARGET "${_LOOM_COMPILE_PACKAGE_NAME}_loom-compile")

function(_loom_compile_enable_provider _target _definition _library)
  target_compile_definitions(${_target} PRIVATE
    ${_definition}=1
  )
  target_link_libraries(${_target} PRIVATE
    ${_library}
  )
endfunction()

if("amdgpu" IN_LIST LOOM_COMPILE_PROVIDERS AND IREE_HAL_DRIVER_AMDGPU)
  _loom_compile_enable_provider(
    ${_LOOM_COMPILE_TARGET}
    LOOM_COMPILE_HAVE_AMDGPU
    loom::src::loom::target::arch::amdgpu::execution_provider
  )
endif()

if("ireevm" IN_LIST LOOM_COMPILE_PROVIDERS)
  _loom_compile_enable_provider(
    ${_LOOM_COMPILE_TARGET}
    LOOM_COMPILE_HAVE_IREEVM
    loom::src::loom::target::emit::ireevm::candidate
  )
  target_link_libraries(${_LOOM_COMPILE_TARGET} PRIVATE
    loom::src::loom::target::emit::ireevm::execution_provider
  )
endif()

unset(_LOOM_COMPILE_TARGET)
unset(_LOOM_COMPILE_PACKAGE_NAME)
unset(_LOOM_COMPILE_ALL_PROVIDERS)
